title: B2C Premium — Subscription & Billing
content:
Overview


The Subscription page is where B2C Premium users manage their plan. It shows current subscription status, offers monthly and yearly plans, displays active subscription details, and provides a cancellation flow with reason collection.



Subscription Status


At the top of the page, a status card shows the user's current subscription state:


  • Not subscribed: Shows the pricing cards for monthly and yearly plans with Subscribe buttons
  • Active subscription: Shows plan name, status (Active), start date, and renewal/expiry date. Yearly subscribers also see their savings amount and additional benefits
  • Cancelling: Shows "Cancels at period end" with the date access will end


Pricing Plans


Two plan options are displayed for users who are not currently subscribed:


Premium Monthly — $9.99/month:


  • Full access to all courses
  • Unlimited textbook access
  • All exam-style quizzes
  • Interactive flashcards
  • Progress tracking
  • Study materials and tools
  • Email support
  • Cancel anytime

Premium Yearly — $99.99/year:


  • Everything in the Monthly plan
  • 12 months of full access
  • Priority support
  • Early access to new features
  • Homework assistance
  • Personalized study plans
  • Advanced analytics
  • Cancel anytime

The yearly plan saves approximately 16% compared to monthly billing — equivalent to $8.33/month. A green "SAVE 16%" badge highlights this on the yearly card.



Active Subscription Details


For users with an active subscription, a details card shows:


  • Plan: Monthly or Yearly
  • Status: Active with a green indicator
  • Started: Date the subscription began
  • Renews/Expires: Next billing date for monthly, or expiry date for yearly
  • Savings: Yearly subscribers see how much they save compared to monthly
  • Yearly benefits: Additional perks shown for yearly subscribers

A Cancel Subscription button is available for all active subscribers.



Cancellation Flow


When a user clicks Cancel Subscription, a modal appears with:


  1. Reason chips: Quick-select options including "Tight on cash", "Taking a break", "Found alternative", "Missing features", "Technical issues", and "I'll be back"
  2. Optional feedback: A text field for additional comments
  3. Keep account option: A checkbox (checked by default) to retain the account and study progress for future resubscription
  4. Confirmation: Final cancel button to complete the process

After cancellation, access continues until the end of the current billing period. The subscription status updates to show the expiry date.



FAQ Section


A FAQ section at the bottom answers common questions:


  • What do I get with the subscription? Full access to all courses, textbooks, quizzes, flashcards, and study tools
  • Can I cancel anytime? Yes — access continues until the end of the billing period
  • Monthly vs Yearly — which is better? Comparison showing yearly saves 16% ($8.33/month vs $9.99/month)
  • Do you offer refunds? Refunds only for accidental auto-renewals within 3 days. First-time subscriptions are non-refundable — users should use the free trial to evaluate first


Key Talking Points for Agents


  • "Monthly is $9.99/month, yearly is $99.99/year — that saves about 16%."
  • "You can cancel anytime. Your access continues until the end of your billing period."
  • "When cancelling, you can keep your account and progress — everything will be there if you resubscribe."
  • "Refunds are only available for accidental auto-renewals within 3 days of the charge."
  • "If your subscription shows 'Cancels at period end,' you still have access until that date."
